name: Berry Almond Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease and flour a bundt pan.
3. In a large bowl, sift together flour, cornmeal, cream of tartar, baking soda, and salt.
4. Set aside.
5. Mix soy milk and lemon juice in a separate bowl.
6. Whisk egg replacer and water until light and foamy; set aside.
7. In a medium bowl, mix applesauce and brown sugar. Beat in the egg replacer, corn syrup, and extracts.
8. Add the applesauce mixture and soy milk alternately to the dry ingredients, mixing after each addition.
9. Fold in cranberries and almonds.
10. Pour batter into the prepared bundt pan and bake until a toothpick inserted into the cake comes out clean (about 1 hour).
11. Let cool for 10 minutes, then invert onto a serving plate to finish cooling.
Per serving: 229 calories, 3 grams protein, 217 milligrams sodium, 47 grams carbohydrates, 4 grams fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol, 66 milligrams calcium.
